title: Immediate Requirement Production Engineer at Whirlpool India

jsonLd.title: Immediate Requirement Production Engineer at Whirlpool India
jsonLd.description:
We at Whirlpool India are looking for an experienced Production Engineer based out of Ranchi. If you are a result-oriented professional with a passion for excellence, we want to hear from you.

About Whirlpool India:
Whirlpool India is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Coordinate with design and engineering teams on product improvements
• Implement 5S, Kaizen, and Six Sigma practices on the shop floor
• Manage raw material procurement and inventory levels
• Ensure product quality meets internal and customer specifications
• Oversee daily production operations to meet output targets
• Ensure compliance with safety regulations and factory acts
• Conduct root cause analysis for quality rejections and defects

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Sc / M.Sc in Life Sciences
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in APQP
• Proficiency in Quality Control
• Proficiency in FMEA
• Proficiency in ERP Systems
• Proficiency in AutoCAD
• Proficiency in Supply Chain Management
• Proficiency in Kaizen
• Proficiency in SolidWorks

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Referral bonus program
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Annual performance appraisal
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Ranchi, Jharkhand, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Whirlpool India!
